title: Climbing Stairs
followUps: First, write a pure recursive solution using f(n) = f(n-1) + f(n-2). Observe how slow it becomes around n = 35.
Add memoization with a Map. How does the runtime change?
Rewrite it iteratively with O(1) space by keeping only the last two values.
What if you can take 1, 2, or 3 steps at a time?
